description: True semantic retrieval test dataset with minimal keyword overlap
note: Tests PURE semantic understanding where BM25 cannot help. All queries have <20% keyword overlap with relevant documents but high semantic/conceptual overlap. Designed to isolate embedding model quality.

queries.query: How do I verify a user's identity?

Something went wrong and I need to try again
How do I get the settings for my application?
I want to remember this for later use
Show me what changed between versions
I need to protect sensitive data
How do I handle multiple operations at once?
I want to track what happened in the past
Make sure the input is correct before processing
I need to transform the structure of this object
How do I wait for something to finish?
I need to stop unauthorized access
I need to clean up resources when done

documents.content:
# Input validation
import re
from typing import Optional

def sanitize_user_input(raw_input: str) -> Optional[str]:
    """Clean and validate user-provided text."""
    # Remove dangerous characters
    cleaned = re.sub(r'[<>"\']', '', raw_input)
    
    # Enforce length limits
    if len(cleaned) > 1000:
        return None
    
    # Check against allowed pattern
    if not re.match(r'^[a-zA-Z0-9\s.,!?-]+$', cleaned):
        return None
    
    return cleaned.strip()
